description: Protocol domain becomes a marker. Delete protocol_domain_template (world.rs:1528) and extend_protocol_type_env registry.extend_interfaces(runtime_library::interfaces) (world.rs:1185). Protocol.t resolves via DeriveTypeDef to the opaque marker opaque_of(protocol_domain_tag), element-parametric -- it depends only on the protocol declaration, never the impl set. Dispatch (resolve_protocol_call, semantic.rs:871-885) is UNCHANGED: it already selects by receiver subtype against impl targets and pulls only the impl the receiver demands. Verify: compiler2_enum_reduce_selects_list_protocol_impl and unused_runtime_library_stays_cold stay green.
title: Protocol domain = marker: delete the eager union and interfaces() re-lex
